26 Jun 01:14
v13.37.0
88a1f53
Added
Display a VIP tag when using a VIP referral code. (
#43527
)
Adds
metamask-aep[bot]
to the CLA Signature Bot allowlist in
.github/workflows/cla.yml
. (
#43237
)
Enabled ERC-7715 requests over the Multichain API and MetaMask Connect (
#43513
)
Remove CTA button under notification (
#43685
)
Swaps modal to page (
#43691
)
Fixed display approved transactions for Non-EVM networks (
#43566
)
Add bitcoin connectivity (
#40633
)
Includes
utm_*
parameters from the marketing campaign in the onboarding
Wallet Setup Completed
metrics (
#42638
)
Add QR error handling for invalid transaction signature (
#43402
)
Added configurable max slippage controls for perps market orders (
#43357
)
Changed
perf(6557): Memoize swaps default token selector and remove redundant deep/shallow equality in
useTokensToSearch
(
#43609
)
Fixed
Correct state migration to be identical to real TokenBalancesController (
#43626
)
Fixed Perps order screen back navigation after visiting Add Funds (single back tap now returns to the market detail screen, and trades no longer leave the user on the order screen). (
#43367
)
Fixed product announcement notification links opening MetaMask deeplinks externally before routing. (
#42805
)
Fixed perps close-all-positions toasts not appearing on the home screen perps tab (
#43613
)
Consume batch sell assets data from token controller (
#43460
)
Fixed infinite loader on bridge awaiting signatures page when using QR hardware wallets (
#40838
)
Fixed inconsistent spacing above the orders section on the perps market detail page. (
#43350
)

58b4f88
This commit was created on GitHub.com and signed with GitHub’s
verified signature
.
GPG key ID:
B5690EEEBB952194
Verified
Learn about vigilant mode
.
Added
Added Blockaid spender scanning for legacy ERC-20
increaseApproval
transactions (e.g. LINK, stLINK, BAT). (
#43141
)
Perps market search now matches full market names — e.g. searching "bitcoin" finds BTC (and BCH), "tesla" finds TSLA, "spacex" finds SPCX. (
#43456
)
Added design changes for swaps filter. (
#43453
)
UI update for network filter. (
#43310
)
Updated MM Pay token picker to use inline row layout with error messages shown above the payment details. (
#43313
)
Added compliance blocking for restricted wallets using Perps. (
#42519
)
Extends dapp scanning capability to include path-based domains. (
#42311
)
Added a Batch Sell entry point in the wallet overview action area, allowing users to select and sell multiple tokens across supported networks in one flow. (
#42408
)
Container-based responsive text. (
#43184
)
Activity list redesign. (
#42837
)
Added Money account deeplink handler for the upcoming launch. (
#43739
)
Changed
Updated the Sei native token icon to Sei's maroon token mark. (
#43173
)
Bump
@metamask/assets-controllers
from 108.5.0 to 109.0.0 (
#43422
)
Fixed
Fixed a false "Insufficient funds" error on perps when the size slider is set to 100%. (
#43383
)
Asset picker network. (
#43465
)
Updated gas token picker design to remove background pill and show a right-facing arrow. (
#43165
)
Routed the default zkSync Era RPC through Infura for improved performance and reliability. (
#43407
)
Fixed a bug where Firefox clipped the top of the search field focus outline in Send and Receive. (
#43120
)
Fix trezor connection for Firefox browser. (
#43179
)
Exclude Ondo assets from batch sell select screen. (
#43327
)
Fixed a bug where switching the extension between side panel and popup view and back could reopen MetaMask in the popup,
sometimes leaving both the side panel and popup open at the same time. (
#43221
)
Delete token list. (
#43108
)
Fixed the Perps withdraw button doing nothing when a non-EVM network (Solana, Bitcoin, Tron) was selected. (
#43212
)

docs.title: Home | MetaMask developer documentation
docs.text:
Home | MetaMask developer documentation
Opens in a new window
Opens an external website
Opens an external website in a new window
Close this dialog
This website utilizes technologies such as cookies to enable essential site functionality, as well as for analytics, personalization, and marketing.
To learn more, view the following link:
Cookie Policy
Privacy Policy
Manage Preferences
Storage Preferences
Close Cookie Preferences
For AI agents: a documentation index is available at
/llms.txt
. A markdown version of this page is available at the same URL with .md appended (or via Accept: text/markdown).
Skip to main content
MetaMask SDK
is now
MetaMask Connect
. Go multichain with one integration across Ethereum, Solana, and additional chains as support expands.
Get started
.
Products
Connect to MetaMask
Create embedded wallets
Create smart accounts
Create agent wallets
Extend and scale
Multichain
Connect your dapp to multiple ecosystems.
EVM
Connect your dapp to EVM networks.
Solana
Connect your dapp to Solana.
React SDK
Vue SDK
JavaScript SDK
Node SDK
Unity SDK
Android SDK
iOS SDK
React Native SDK
Flutter SDK
Unreal SDK
Smart Accounts Kit
Create embedded smart accounts or request Advanced Permissions from MetaMask users.
Quickstart
Install the CLI and send your first transfer.
Architecture
Wallet modes, security stack, and async signing.
Trade perpetuals
Open and manage Hyperliquid positions.
Commands reference
All `mm` commands and flags.
Services
Use high performance APIs provided by Infura to build and scale your dapp.
Snaps
Extend MetaMask functionality with custom features.
Quickstart
Tutorials
Faucet
Help ↗
Search or Ask AI
⌘
K
MetaMask developer documentation
Build with the world's leading self-custodial crypto wallet.
What do you want to do with MetaMask?
Connect to MetaMask
Connect your dapp to the
MetaMask browser extension and mobile app
. Interact with users' accounts across
multichain, EVM, or Solana
networks using a single integration.
Create embedded wallets
Onboard users to your dapp via
social logins
, or by integrating your own
authentication providers
. No seed phrases required.
Create smart accounts
Create and interact with
MetaMask Smart Accounts
, unlocking new
programmable account behaviors
and granular permission sharing.
Create agent wallets
Give
AI agents programmatic wallet access
via the
MetaMask Agent Wallet CLI
. Transfer, swap, trade, and sign with
mandatory security
on every transaction.
Build and scale your dapp
Use
high performance APIs
provided by MetaMask and
Infura
to build and scale your dapp or Snap.
Extend MetaMask
Create a
custom mini app (Snap)
that runs inside the MetaMask extension. Add support for
custom networks
, account types, and APIs.
Contribute to MetaMask on GitHub
Join the MetaMask developer community and learn how to contribute to the MetaMask project itself.
Contribute
Contribute
Documentation

Smart Accounts Kit
Agent Wallet
Snaps

Consensys terms of use

Consensys does not recommend the use of any Snap by any particular person for any particular reason. You access, rely upon or use the Third Party Service at your own risk. Consensys disclaims all responsibility and liability for any losses on account of your use of Third Party Services. Any information you share with Third Party Services will be collected directly by those Third Party Services in accordance with their privacy policies. Please refer to their privacy policies for more information. Consensys has no access to information you share with Third Party Services.

analysis.name: MetaMask
analysis.value_proposition: A self-custodial crypto wallet to trade, save, send, spend, and earn across Ethereum, Solana, and other chains.
analysis.ideal_customer: Crypto users who want a self-custodial wallet for trading, DeFi, and payments, plus developers integrating wallet functionality into dapps.

features.name: swap
features.description: Safely exchange any token across popular networks.
features.evidence_quote: Swap thousands of tokens on every popular network

features.name: perpetuals trading
features.description: Long or short tokens with up to 50x leverage.
features.evidence_quote: Long or short perps with up to 50x leverage

features.name: real-world assets trading
features.description: Trade tokenized stocks, funds, and commodities.
features.evidence_quote: Buy tokenized stocks, funds, and commodities

features.name: prediction markets
features.description: Trade on the outcomes of real-world events.
features.evidence_quote: Trade on the future with prediction markets

features.name: fiat on-ramp
features.description: Turn cash to crypto directly in-wallet.
features.evidence_quote: Buy — Turn cash to crypto

features.name: crypto card
features.description: Spend crypto for daily purchases, up to 3% back.
features.evidence_quote: Spend anywhere with MetaMask Card, get up to 3% back

features.name: mUSD stablecoin
features.description: MetaMask USD — earn and spend a native stablecoin.
features.evidence_quote: Easily earn and spend with MetaMask USD

features.name: money account
features.description: Interest-bearing account paying up to 4% APY on mUSD.
features.evidence_quote: Earn up to 4% APY on your mUSD with the powerful new Money Account.

features.name: global transfers
features.description: Send and receive money globally, instantly.
features.evidence_quote: Send and receive money globally, instantly

features.name: rewards program
features.description: Rewards for using MetaMask products.
features.evidence_quote: Rewards

features.name: transaction shield
features.description: Transaction protection covering losses up to $10k.
features.evidence_quote: Transaction protection available up to $10k

features.name: agent wallet
features.description: Programmatic wallet access for AI agents with mandatory security on every transaction.
features.evidence_quote: Give AI agents programmatic wallet access via the MetaMask Agent Wallet CLI.

features.name: snaps
features.description: Custom mini-apps that run inside the MetaMask extension to add networks, account types, or APIs.
features.evidence_quote: Create a custom mini app (Snap) that runs inside the MetaMask extension.

features.name: browser extension
features.description: Chrome/Firefox/Edge browser wallet extension.
features.evidence_quote: 100MM+ downloads across Google Play, the App Store, and Chrome Web Store

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS and Android wallet apps.
features.evidence_quote: 4.7★ rating on the App Store

features.name: multichain support
features.description: Connect to multiple ecosystems with one integration (Ethereum, Solana, more).
features.evidence_quote: Go multichain with one integration across Ethereum, Solana, and additional chains

features.name: solana support
features.description: Native Solana network support.
features.evidence_quote: Connect your dapp to Solana.

features.name: bitcoin support
features.description: Bitcoin connectivity added to the wallet.
features.evidence_quote: Add bitcoin connectivity (#40633)

features.name: metamask connect
features.description: SDK for dapps to integrate MetaMask across chains.
features.evidence_quote: MetaMask SDK is now MetaMask Connect.

features.name: embedded wallets
features.description: Onboard users to dapps via social logins or custom auth — no seed phrases.
features.evidence_quote: Onboard users to your dapp via social logins... No seed phrases required.

features.name: smart accounts kit
features.description: Create programmable smart accounts with granular permission sharing.
features.evidence_quote: Create and interact with MetaMask Smart Accounts, unlocking new programmable account behaviors

features.name: developer dashboard
features.description: Manage API keys and endpoints.
features.evidence_quote: Dashboard — Manage API keys and endpoints

features.name: infura apis
features.description: High-performance APIs to build and scale dapps.
features.evidence_quote: Use high performance APIs provided by MetaMask and Infura

features.name: sdk (react/vue/js/node/unity/android/ios/react native/flutter/unreal)
features.description: Native SDKs across major platforms and game engines.
features.evidence_quote: React SDK Vue SDK JavaScript SDK Node SDK Unity SDK Android SDK iOS SDK React Native SDK Flutter SDK Unreal SDK

features.name: hardware wallet support
features.description: QR-based hardware wallet integration (e.g., for bridge signatures).
features.evidence_quote: Fixed infinite loader on bridge awaiting signatures page when using QR hardware wallets

features.name: blockaid scanning
features.description: Spender scanning for legacy ERC-20 approvals (e.g., LINK, BAT).
features.evidence_quote: Added Blockaid spender scanning for legacy ERC-20 increaseApproval transactions

features.name: erc-7715 advanced permissions
features.description: Enables ERC-7715 permission requests over Multichain API and MetaMask Connect.
features.evidence_quote: Enabled ERC-7715 requests over the Multichain API and MetaMask Connect

features.name: hyperliquid integration
features.description: Open and manage Hyperliquid perpetuals positions.
features.evidence_quote: Trade perpetuals — Open and manage Hyperliquid positions.

features.name: configurable slippage
features.description: Configurable max slippage controls for perps market orders.
features.evidence_quote: Added configurable max slippage controls for perps market orders

features.name: vip referral program
features.description: VIP tag displayed when using a VIP referral code.
features.evidence_quote: Display a VIP tag when using a VIP referral code.

features.name: 24/7 customer support
features.description: Round-the-clock support in 134 languages.
features.evidence_quote: 24/7 customer support in 134 languages

features.name: faucet
features.description: Developer testnet faucet.
features.evidence_quote: Faucet

features.name: self-custodial wallet
features.description: Users hold their own keys — no custodian.
features.evidence_quote: Build with the world's leading self-custodial crypto wallet.

features.name: security audits
features.description: Regularly audited by security firms; rated #1 most secure by Coinspect.
features.evidence_quote: Rated the #1 most secure wallet by Coinspect

differentiators: Rated #1 most secure wallet by Coinspect
Multichain (Ethereum + Solana + Bitcoin) with one integration
AI Agent Wallet with mandatory security on every transaction
Native mUSD stablecoin with 4% APY money account

recent_ships.what: v13.37.0 — VIP referral tag, ERC-7715 over Multichain API, bitcoin connectivity, configurable perps slippage, QR hardware wallet bridge fix
v13.36.0 — Blockaid spender scanning for legacy ERC-20 increaseApproval, expanded perps market search (bitcoin→BTC, tesla→TSLA)
Money Account launched — earn up to 4% APY on mUSD
recent_ships.source: NEW — Earn up to 4% APY on your mUSD with the powerful new Money Account

recent_ships.what: MetaMask SDK rebranded to MetaMask Connect with multichain integration
recent_ships.source: MetaMask SDK is now MetaMask Connect

recent_ships.what: Agent Wallet CLI for AI agent programmatic wallet access
RWAs (tokenized stocks/ETFs) and Perps (50x leverage) launched
recent_ships.source: landing — NEW tags on Perps and RWAs

praised: Rated #1 most secure wallet by Coinspect
100MM+ downloads across Google Play, App Store, and Chrome Web Store
complaints: Phishing risk — 'NameCheap's email hacked to send Metamask, DHL phishing emails' (HN 250↑)
License controversy — 'MetaMask replaces MIT License, claims ownership of all forks' (HN 45↑)
Play Store removal — 'Google Removes Metamask from the Play Store, Appeal Rejected' (HN 34↑)
Security concerns — 'An casual code review of MetaMask's crypto' (HN 35↑)
Key theft risk — 'My MetaMask Private Keys Stolen from GitHub Private Repo in 1 Hour' (HN 25↑)
Geo-blocking — 'MetaMask and Infura bans Venezuela IPs' (HN 11↑)

free_tier.limits: Wallet itself is free; transaction fees apply to on-chain activity

tiers.name: Free (wallet)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full wallet: swap, perps, RWAs, predict, card, mUSD, money account, transaction shield

pricing.notes: No public /pricing page (returned 404). MetaMask wallet is free to use — revenue comes from swap fees (~0.875%), card interchange, and developer tier pricing via Infura. Card offers up to 3% back; Money Account pays up to 4% APY on mUSD.

recent_hn.title: Show HN: A glitchy browser card game – does this feel playable?
